hero.label: Made for HappyRobot
hero.headline: I want to be the first SDR who closes deals in Spanish.
hero.subheadline: HappyRobot is building the AI OS for the real economy, and I want in on the ground floor. Spanish founders building AI agents that replace logistics workflows — this isn't just a job, it's the kind of mission I'd explain at dinner. I bring 14 months of BDR hustle and a hunger to help you scale faster.

whyCompany.title: AI voice agents for logistics is the real deal — not a demo
whyCompany.body: HappyRobot isn't pitching a concept. You're already automating check calls, price negotiations, and workflows for real supply chain operators. $62M from a16z, YC, and Base10 backs a team that ships. I want to be on the phone generating the pipeline that feeds that engine.

whyCompany.title: You raised $44M Series B in Sept 2025 — you're hiring now, fast
whyCompany.body: Post-Series B is the exact moment an SDR can compound their career. The team is scaling, the ICP is defined, and the playbook is being written. I'd rather join now and help write it than join at Series C and execute someone else's script.

whyCompany.title: I spent 14 months building B2B pipeline from scratch at a startup
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I ran cold outreach via HubSpot and LinkedIn sequences and helped sign 15-20 paying clients starting from zero. No SDR team above me, no warm leads handed over — just a product and a list. That's the same energy HappyRobot needs from its first SDR hires.

quote: I'm Spanish, I know what it means to build something from scratch in a country that isn't yours. HappyRobot's founders did that. I want to join the team that's doing it.
